programmes.show_description: Only She Knows. When 20-year-old Chloe Randolph gives birth to a baby boy, her family is over the moon, but what should be a blissful time turns into a waking nightmare. S8, Ep1
I Had No Choice. For years, Bill, Stephanie, and their three kids hide their torment while struggling to keep up appearances. But in 2011, the façade shatters for good. S8, Ep2
In My Heart, I Knew. Police hope surveillance footage will lead them to a missing teenager before it's too late. But their hunt exposes a trail of terrible secrets. S8, Ep1
Driven To Murder. When the body of Dawn Meade is found on the side of the road, detectives must determine if it is an accidental death or something more sinister. S8, Ep2

Scattered Clues. Explores three murder cases in which investigators secured convictions from trace evidence, including fingerprinting, fibre analysis and DNA testing. S4, Ep3
Natural Witness. Features investigations in which natural clues, including insect bites, cat hair and a rare form of bacteria helped forensic scientists solve murders. S4, Ep4
The Great Philby Mob War. Three armed men attack a man and flee the scene. Authorities are unable to identify the assailants but are convinced it was the work of the Mafia. S7, Ep3
Death in the Delta. Shannon Sanderson was abducted after a successful night at the casino and police discovered she had been stalked and attacked for her $5,000 winnings. S4, Ep9
Edith Fraud And The Sykes Family. Judge Rinder looks at a family whose lives were destroyed, after a mother-of-two left her children in the care of her ex-husband. S3, Ep4
Welcome To The Murderhood. 40-year-old Priscilla Strole seeks a fresh start when she and her teenage son move to a small town in California, unaware it will lead to her untimely end. S3, Ep8
Vanished In The Night. 26-year-old Kirsten Breuggeman mysteriously vanished from view on a CCTV camera one night in 2021. It is the last known sighting of Kirsten. S10, Ep5
Watching Amy Lord. 24-year-old former cheerleader Amy Lord goes missing. CCTV footage from ATMs and outside her home captures the moment she was taken by her killer. S2, Ep6
Target On Her Back. 24-year-old Caroline Nosel befriends new colleague Christopher O'Kroley, but he soon begins harassing her. After he is dismissed from work, he seeks revenge. S1, Ep1
The Pain-Killer. When a medical board strikes off Arkansas pain doctor Randeep Mann amid accusations about his practice, he launches a volatile plot to regain power. S1, Ep2
Blood Badge. A respected police Lieutenant, Billy Fields, fails to solve the murder of a young mother. Years later, the reason why becomes shockingly clear. S1, Ep4

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: Six Pounds Of Pressure. A mother raises the alarm when her daughter goes missing. An unusual suspect comes forward to confess, but her story doesn't quite add up. S3, Ep9
Adele Bellis And Shaken Baby. Judge Robert Rinder examines the story of a volatile relationship, and a devastating crime committed on a 15-week-old baby. S3, Ep5
Fire Angel. A bartender interrupts a burglary at her home in Illinois. Detectives use CCTV footage to track down the attacker and bring them to justice. S6, Ep10
The Girl On The Bike. In 1972, a young woman's life is violently cut short, and investigators hunt for a bogeyman across the forests and farms of the Pacific Northwest. S9, Ep5
She Had No Name. A young woman vanishes into a patrol car. For 35 years, she's a Jane Doe, until hypnosis reveals a clue that unmasks a predator hiding in plain sight. S1, Ep5
Edith Fraud And The Sykes Family. Judge Rinder looks at a family whose lives were destroyed, after a mother-of-two left her children in the care of her ex-husband. S3, Ep4
Breathe For Me Mom. Cheri and Brian dote on their only child, Scott, and his kids. The close-knit family thrives until a shocking betrayal tears them apart. S9, Ep1
It's Over. Move On. Popular and outgoing, Rowena aspires to be a teen psychologist. But her dreams turn into a nightmare when a pathological love connection shatters everything. S8, Ep4
The Tragedy On Tennessee 14. When a Tennessee State Trooper is murdered on a highway, police turn to his dashcam for answers. It takes more surveillance video to find the killer. S8, Ep3
Final Offer. A single mum leaves for work one morning and never returns. Police analyse a sinister trail of security camera footage, hoping to find her. S8, Ep4

False Witness. How advances in technology can expose a murderous liar, such as the man who staged his wife's suicide to cash in a $100,000 life insurance policy. S5, Ep1
Missing. Investigating America's 1.8 million missing people; some of whom are runaways who find their way home, whilst others simply disappear. S5, Ep3
The Price of Greed. Follows the FBI investigation into a robbery in which masked gunmen tied up employees at an armoured truck depot and left with $18.9 million. S5, Ep1
Caught in the Act. Follows FBI investigations into similar armed robberies across the US in which several people were killed by two male suspects. S5, Ep2
Tracie Andrews & Mike Gifford-Hull. What exposed Tracie Andrews' lie that a road rage attack killed her lover? Mike Gifford-Hull's TV plea for his missing wife Farsi hides the truth. S2, Ep2
Partners in Crime. Investigates partners who commit crimes, including two cab drivers, and a new DNA technique that can extract clues from four-year-old evidence. S4, Ep2
Tainted Trust. Three cases illustrate how poison, including arsenic and potassium chloride, can be used as a murder weapon. S4, Ep5
Till Death Do Us Part. An examination of what happens when lovers turn on each other, and ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce. S4, Ep7
Disappearance In The Desert. Daniel Robinson arrives at his work site in the Arizona desert. A co-worker claims he was acting strangely before leaving in the middle of his shift. S10, Ep3
Vanished In The Night. 26-year-old Kirsten Breuggeman mysteriously vanished from view on a CCTV camera one night in 2021. It is the last known sighting of Kirsten. S10, Ep5
A Vanishing On The Border. When Kimberly Avila, a trans Latina woman, fails to return after a night out in Texas, her family fears she was taken or killed by a cartel member. S10, Ep4
New Mom Missing. Successful lawyer and new mum Ciera Breland disappears after she and her husband visit his mother in Georgia. It emerges her perfect life isn't what it seems. S10, Ep8
The Sweetest Man In The World. The search for a missing bus driver reveals a complicated love triangle. It leaves investigators with more questions than answers. S10, Ep7
Golden State Bridge. On September 20th, 2020, 19-year-old Sydney West decided to visit the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco and mysteriously vanished into the fog. S11, Ep1
I Will Kill. Amber vanishes on Friday the 13th. A year later, Chelsea disappears. A survivor links the cases as police race to stop a hidden predator. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: New: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: Pathologically Evil. After four women vanish and their cases go cold for decades, Texas Ranger Jim Holland must bond with a serial killer to pry loose the truth. S1, Ep1
